commit.message:
feat: add coach personal training insights — PRs, typing, volume analytics, testing records

Gives coaches who train themselves the same analytical depth that athletes get:
- CoachPR/CoachTyping/CoachTestingRecord schema models with PR auto-detection
- Tabbed My Training page (Sessions, Insights, Records, My Typing)
- Volume charts, RPE trends, distance trends, implement distribution, sequencing compliance
- Bondarchuk typing quiz (19 questions) with classification and recommended method
- Testing records with strength/implement logging
- PR badges on session drill rows, celebration on log completion
- Competitive/recreational training mode toggle in settings
- Bondarchuk validation warnings in competitive mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add pipeline configuration support to MiniCroft, audio testing harnesses, and listener pipeline testing (#44)

* feat: add PADACIOSO_PIPELINE, M2V_PIPELINE, pipeline validation, is_pipeline_available()

- Add PADACIOSO_PIPELINE constant (pure Python, always available via ovos-workshop)
- Add M2V_PIPELINE constant for vector-based intent matching
- Update DEFAULT_TEST_PIPELINE to include padacioso stages alongside padatious
  (padacioso is always available; padatious is optional and may not be on CI)
- Add MiniCroft._check_pipeline_available(): raises RuntimeError early if any
  stage in default_pipeline is not installed — fails loudly instead of silently
  producing fewer messages than expected
- Add is_pipeline_available(pipeline): cheap entry-point check usable in setUpClass
  to skip tests when optional pipeline plugins are absent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(minicroft): add pipeline_config parameter for per-plugin config overrides

Add `pipeline_config: Optional[Dict[str, Dict]] = None` to `MiniCroft.__init__`
so tests can override pipeline plugin configuration (e.g. M2V model path) without
relying on the user's local mycroft.conf. Overrides are patched into
`Configuration()["intents"]` before `super().__init__()` and restored in `stop()`.

Useful for forcing the multilingual M2V model in tests regardless of what
mycroft.conf has configured locally (e.g. a language-specific model).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(minicroft): add 5 tests for pipeline_config parameter

Cover: config patched while running, restored after stop(), existing key
preserved on restore, None does not patch, multiple keys all patched/restored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update MAINTENANCE_REPORT with pipeline_config test count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add MiniListener for audio transformer pipeline testing

Introduces `MiniListener`, `get_mini_listener()`, and `ListenerTest` to
enable end-to-end testing of AudioTransformer plugins through the full
`AudioTransformersService` pipeline on a FakeBus — without real hardware.

- `ovoscope/listener.py` — new module with MiniListener, get_mini_listener,
  ListenerTest dataclass
- `ovoscope/__init__.py` — re-export new symbols via try/except import
- `docs/listener.md` — new: MiniListener API reference with source citations
- `docs/index.md` — add listener section, update Public API table

Validated with GGWavePlugin as first concrete test (see ggwave plugin repo).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: extend MiniListener with full pipeline listen() method

Adds listen(audio, language, stt_instance) to MiniListener — the first
method that exercises the complete listener pipeline end-to-end:

  WAV file / PCM bytes
    → AudioTransformersService.transform()
    → stt_instance.execute(AudioData, language)
    → recognizer_loop:utterance  (FakeBus)
    → captured messages

Also adds _wav_to_audio_data() helper that uses AudioData.from_file()
for file paths and the wave stdlib module for raw bytes, correctly
reading sample_rate and sample_width from the WAV header.

Removes MiniSTT/stt.py (wrong abstraction level — STT is part of the
listener pipeline, not a separate harness).

Validated by 17 ROVER STT E2E tests that feed the real jfk.wav through
MiniListener.listen() with mocked backends (ROVER / wROVER / itROVER).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update listener.md to document listen() method and STT pipeline

- Add full pipeline conceptual diagram (audio → transformers → STT → utterance)
- Document MiniListener.listen() signature, sequence, and _wav_to_audio_data helper
- Add STT pipeline quick-start example
- Add cross-reference to ROVER E2E test as second concrete usage example
- Correct source line citations for MiniListener

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(audio): add AudioServiceHarness, PlaybackServiceHarness and audio test utilities

Introduces `ovoscope.audio` — a new optional module for testing ovos-audio
services without real hardware, TTS engines, or network access.

New public API:
- `MockAudioBackend` — no-op AudioBackend tracking play/pause/stop/duck state
- `AudioServiceHarness` — context manager wrapping AudioService + MockAudioBackend
  on a FakeBus; now registers all bus handlers including get/set_track_position,
  get_track_length, seek_forward, seek_backward
- `MockTTS` — no-op TTS writing a silent WAV, recording spoken_utterances
- `PlaybackServiceHarness` — context manager wrapping PlaybackService + MockTTS
- `AudioCaptureSession` — records bus messages by prefix for sequence assertions
- `SILENT_WAV` — minimal valid WAV bytes constant for instant-play tests

Also adds:
- `pyproject.toml` optional dependency `[audio]` extra
- `docs/audio-testing.md` — full API reference with examples
- `test/unittests/test_audio_harness.py` — 38 unit tests for all harness classes
- FAQ.md / QUICK_FACTS.md / AUDIT.md updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): fix CI failures by adding dev extra and pinning python version

- Add [dev] extra to pyproject.toml including audio and pydantic dependencies
- Update CI workflows to use Python 3.12 and install [dev] extras
- Add @unittest.skipUnless(AUDIO_AVAILABLE) guards to all audio test classes
- Fix python_version matrix in build and release workflows

* docs: remove hardcoded line numbers and fix module paths

- Fix references to ovoscope/ovoscope/audio.py -> ovoscope/audio.py
- Remove hardcoded line numbers from documentation and audit reports
- Update AUDIT.md to reflect fixed status of unit tests

* feat(audio): enhance audio testing robustness and CI

- Added LIGHT_TEST_PIPELINE as a lightweight fallback when Adapt/Padatious are missing.
- Updated MiniCroft to auto-fallback to LIGHT_TEST_PIPELINE if stages are missing.
- Refactored PlaybackServiceHarness for better robustness (proper patch cleanup, timeout handling).
- Added skip guard to audio harness tests to prevent failures when ovos-audio is not installed.
- Fixed documentation path references and added prerequisites.
- Added missing LICENSE (Apache-2.0) file.
- Updated CI workflows to include audio extra for unit tests.

* chore: address CodeRabbit review comments

- MiniListener: persist stt_instance and use as default in listen()
- MiniCroft: ensure config rollback on __init__ failure
- MiniCroft: make stop() safe for incomplete initialization
- Imports: improve ImportError handling for optional components
- Tests: replace real-time sleeps with deterministic waits in test_audio_harness.py
- Docs: update index.md to reflect STT support in MiniListener
- Maintenance: fix duplicate prefixes in MAINTENANCE_REPORT.md

* chore: address second round of CodeRabbit review comments

- MiniCroft: implement DEFAULT_PIPELINE_UNSET sentinel for default_pipeline
- MiniCroft: refactor get_minicroft to ensure cleanup on startup failure
- PlaybackServiceHarness: ensure cleanup on __enter__ failure
- Imports: refine ModuleNotFoundError handling for optional dependencies
- Tests: refactor multiple-speak test for better robustness
- Docs: make wait_for_response example fully runnable in audio-testing.md
- Audit: update AUDIT.md documenting fixed issues and next steps

---------

commit.message:
Refactor MI prompts to follow Compassframe reflection spec

- buildFirstTurnSystemPrompt: explicit 3-part structure (reflective
  understanding + tentative emotional awareness + one question),
  role-specific guidance, filler phrases banned by example,
  insight disabled for round 1
- buildMISystemPrompt: phase guidance rewritten with spec language
  (situation/feeling+tension/meaning+patterns/consolidation), 3-part
  structure stated explicitly, insight rules tightened (only when
  pattern emerges across turns, soft language, rejection = drop it),
  shared rules and anti-repetition blocks preserved
- buildOpeningSystemPrompt: simplified and aligned with spec tone
- JSON contract and parser compatibility unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix exponential re-inference of failed rec defs (gvariant.nix 7s → 0.12s)

When a def in a `rec {}` block failed during SCC inference (e.g.
gvariant.nix's `mkValue` has a genuine type error), it was not recorded
in poly_type_env. Later, infer_bindings_to_attrset would re-infer the
failed def's body from scratch at root level, triggering a massive
cascade of extrusions and constraint propagation — 580K+ type slots and
11.5M cache entries for gvariant.nix alone.

Fix: record failed SCC group defs in poly_type_env using their
pre-allocated name slot, preventing redundant re-inference.

Also adds permanent timing instrumentation (behind log levels) for SCC
groups, infer_root, and canonicalization phases, and initializes
env_logger in the CLI binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: major project snapshot — 4 papers submitted, E031-E040 experiments, exploration suite

Papers:
- P1 submitted to Asian Perspectives (MS# 019A-0326)
- P2 submitted to JCAA (#280) with Go Frendi Gunawan
- P5 submitted to BKI (Bijdragen)
- P7 submitted to Antiquity Project Gallery
- P8 draft v0.1 complete, red-teamed, awaiting author review

Experiments (E031-E040):
- E031: Candi siting SUCCESS (west-cluster p<0.0001), orientation null
- E032: Pranata Mangsa × eruption seasonality (chi2 p=0.042)
- E033: Indianization Curve (rho=-0.211, p=0.030)
- E034: Panji in Malagasy (informative negative)
- E035: Prasasti botanical keywords (15 plants, 92.9% coverage)
- E036: Hanacaraka phonological inventory (33→20 consonants)
- E037: Prasasti dating ML (MAE=115yr, conditional)
- E038: Volcanic vocabulary drift (informative negative)
- E039: VCS cross-cultural trilogy (informative negative — VCS local only)
- E040: Bamboo Civilization SUCCESS (63.4% organic vs 27.2% lithic in prasasti)

Key findings:
- E040 confirms P1 taphonomic bias thesis from the inscriptions themselves
- E040c meta-taphonomic: genre determines visibility (C8 Sanskrit=invisible)
- E039 constrains P11: VCS rejected at global scale, valid only locally
- I-053: Hanacaraka is unique narrative pangram among Brahmic scripts

Also includes: governance docs, idea registry, trigger map, dashboard,
AI disclosure template, revision ammo for P1/P5/P8, handoff documents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: load model in fp32 to let Trainer handle mixed precision

Loading model in fp16 causes all gradients to be fp16, which the
grad scaler cannot unscale. Loading in fp32 and letting fp16 mixed
precision handle the casting fixes this.

commit.message:
Add RSZImageGenerate node, Flux2 latent upscale, LTXV single-guide rediffusion

- New RSZImageGenerate: all-in-one Z-Image Turbo node with Qwen3-4B text
  encoding, RenormCFG, normal scheduler (shift=3.0), 10-step default
- Flux2: latent upscale (half-res first pass + bilinear upscale + re-diffuse),
  tiled VAE decode for large images, SageAttention status logging
- LTXV: single-guide rediffusion to eliminate keyframe snapping during upscale
  (priority: first > last > middle)
- All three nodes: uuid IS_CHANGED to fix ComfyUI caching issues with seeds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf/fix: comprehensive codebase optimization

Performance:
- Add DB indexes on personas (visibility, category, usageCount, creatorId),
  threads (userId, updatedAt), messages (threadId) — eliminates full-table scans
- Parallel Promise.all in threads.getById for thread + messages fetch
- Parallel Promise.all in chat route for message insert + thread timestamp update
- Switch streaming accumulator from string concat to array buffer (O(n²) → O(n))
- Add 500-entry LRU cache for query classification results
- Use useDeferredValue in MarketplaceView to debounce search without extra deps

Security/Authorization:
- Verify thread ownership in chat route before writing messages
- Export endpoint now requires auth (protectedProcedure) and checks visibility
- Add persona delete with ownership guard
- Rate limiting middleware (20 req/min) on AI procedures
- Input length caps on all user-supplied strings (query: 500, instructions: 2000, etc.)
- Allowlist of supported LLM models in chat route

Type Safety:
- Eliminate all `as any` casts — introduce castPersona() helper with proper types
- Proper NextAuth module augmentation (next-auth.d.ts) — remove session.user as any
- Export authOptions from NextAuth route for use in getServerSession()
- CategoryEnum z.enum shared across create/update/list
- LLMConfig and PersonaTone imported from @persona-hub/types throughout

Code Quality:
- Replace generic Error throws with typed TRPCError (NOT_FOUND, UNAUTHORIZED, TOO_MANY_REQUESTS)
- Fix broken search — personas.list now queries ilike on name, description, tags
- Add personas.update mutation with system prompt regeneration on content changes
- Add personas.delete mutation with ownership check
- Add threads.updateTitle mutation
- Thread title auto-set from first user message on chat completion
- Error state with AlertCircle in MarketplaceView and SmartAskBar
- Character counter + rate limit error messaging in SmartAskBar

commit.message:
fix: add /api/video/:id.mp4 endpoint for Metricool Reel posting

Metricool inspects URL to determine media type. Without .mp4 extension,
it treats video as an image, posting as a regular post instead of a Reel.
New endpoint streams video with Content-Type: video/mp4 and no
Content-Disposition: attachment header. Frontend now converts download
URLs to /api/video/JOBID.mp4 format before sending to Metricool.

...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

* fix: sync pnpm-lock.yaml to platform-core 1.0.2, match package-lock.json

pnpm-lock.yaml was resolving @wopr-network/platform-core to 1.0.1 while
package-lock.json (regenerated by Dependabot) resolved to 1.0.2, causing
the two lock files to disagree on which version is installed.

Run pnpm update @wopr-network/platform-core to advance pnpm's resolution
to 1.0.2 and update the specifier in package.json to ^1.0.2 accordingly.
Both lock files now agree.

commit.message:
Re-enable delta sync for Readeck 0.22 and improve sync resilience (#108)

* Re-enable delta sync for Readeck 0.22 and improve sync resilience

Restores the delta sync endpoint (GET /bookmarks/sync) now that Readeck 0.22
fixes the SQLite bug. Delta sync provides immediate deletion detection on
pull-to-refresh and app open, replacing the 24-hour full sync interval for
deletion detection. Full sync is retained as a weekly safety fallback.

Key changes:
- Update SyncStatusDto to match 0.22 API schema (type/time fields)
- Restore performDeltaSync() in BookmarkRepositoryImpl
- Add delta sync to LoadBookmarksWorker (pull-to-refresh + app open)
- Prefer delta sync in FullSyncWorker with full sync fallback on failure
- Add 15-minute option to auto-sync schedule
- Add EncryptedSharedPreferences corruption recovery in EncryptionHelper
- Remove incompatible POST /bookmarks/sync endpoint (now multipart/mixed)
- Guard app-open sync against unauthenticated state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Archive implemented specs related to sync process

* Use server event time for sync cursor to prevent clock skew issues

Persist the max server timestamp from delta sync responses instead of
Clock.System.now() to avoid missing changes when device clock is ahead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: marketplace V2 — native marketplace.json + plugin-dev skill (#10)

Converts the marketplace from the inline-copy architecture (V1) to
Claude Code's native marketplace.json model (DEC-MARKET-006):

- Add .claude-plugin/marketplace.json listing atuin-history with
  GitHub source (Mastermjr/atuin-claude-ctrl-plugin). Claude Code
  clones from the source repo directly — no inline file copies needed.
- Add .claude-plugin/plugin.json making the marketplace repo itself
  a plugin that provides the plugin-dev skill (DEC-MARKET-007).
- Create skills/plugin-dev/SKILL.md — comprehensive 795-line reference
  for the full Claude Code plugin system: manifest, all 6 source types,
  all component types, all 14 hook events, 3 hook types, marketplace
  authoring, strict mode, caching, CLI commands, distribution patterns
  (DEC-SKILL-001).
- Remove plugins/ directory (inline file copies, superseded by
  marketplace.json GitHub source).
- Remove .github/workflows/sync-atuin-history.yml (sync workflow,
  superseded by native GitHub source resolution).
- Rewrite README.md to accurately reflect the new architecture.

Co-authored-by: Mastermjr <mastermjr@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(auth,labels): add missing transaction and fix label deletion bug

Move account+provider creation into a service-level transaction to
prevent orphaned accounts on failure. Fix removeLabelFromIssue to
filter by both issueId and labelId instead of deleting all labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: complete admin panel implementation

- Supabase client setup (server, browser, admin/service-role)
- Google OAuth login with superadmin gate (proxy middleware)
- Terminal Noir visual style (black bg, grid overlay, colored accents)
- Dashboard with stats: user/image/caption/vote counts, weekly trends,
  30-day voting chart, top captions, content visibility donut, activity
  feed, moderation counts
- Users page: READ profiles with avatars, search, pagination, stats
- Images page: full CRUD with modal form, filters, pagination
- Captions page: READ with image thumbnails, vote counts, search
- Access denied page for non-superadmin users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: migration upgrade framework with CLI, rollback, and dry-run

Migrations 006-012: tenant API key columns, 8 performance indexes,
rate_limit_log created_at, ledger function updates (pagination +
partitioned advisory lock), RAG/outbox/agent_memory schema consolidation
Migrator: rollback support via .down.sql companions, dry_run() and
dry_run_rollback(), version compatibility check, auto_migrate flag
CLI: python -m cortexdb.migrate (status/up/down --to N/--dry-run)
Server: startup compatibility guard with CORTEXDB_AUTO_MIGRATE env var

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Review: Zip/Spec/ZstdFrame.lean proof quality audit (#1153)

* refactor: use nomatch instead of absurd/nofun in ZstdFrame.lean

Standardize contradiction handling to use `exact nomatch h` (13 uses)
instead of `exact absurd h nofun` (12→0 uses). Matches codebase
convention — `nomatch` is used 600+ times in Zip/Spec/ vs 63 for
`absurd/nofun`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: add progress entry for #1149

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve AI analysis failures for completed games from history

Session analysis crashed with `'dict' object has no attribute 'winner_ids'`
and hand analysis rendered empty because nested dataclasses (BettingRound,
ActionRecord, AIDecision, HandEvent) were stored as plain dicts in JSONB
but the analyzer accessed them with attribute notation.

Added `deserialize_completed_hand()` to properly reconstruct nested types
from DB round-trip. Also fixed frontend error handling for fallback responses
and stress test reliability (duplicate listener guards, stuck game bailout,
WinnerModal data-testid).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix theme flash by making applyPalette non-destructive

Overwrite CSS variables in place instead of removing all vars before
re-applying. Only remove vars that are no longer in the new palette,
eliminating the brief moment where no vars are set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
자살 예측 모델 v3: 가계대출 증가율 추가로 R² 0.33→0.37 향상

- 가계대출 총액(BOK DT_151Y002)과 대출금리(BOK DT_121Y006) 데이터 추가
- v3 모델: 7변수 (v2 + 가계대출 YoY 증가율, lag 9개월)
- 대출 증가율 둔화 1%p → 9개월 후 자살 +11명 (β=-10.6)
- v3 예측: 2026-09 최대 위험, +25.0% (v2의 +18.3%에서 상향)
- 대시보드(6_suicide_deep.py)에 v3 예측 시각화 섹션 추가
- 평가자 인사이트 데이터 추가 (3/7~3/11)

commit.message:
Fix QA issues: draft pick trading, sim realism, player development, playoff watching, trade UI

- Draft pick trading: build draftOrder from draftPicks (picks now actually transfer),
  generate 3 years of picks at init, mark picks as used when drafted, filter used/old
  picks from all trade UIs
- Simulation: reduce QB passing yards (lower pass frequency, completion cap, bonus yards),
  limit OL sacks allowed to 5 starters, weight DL sacks toward starters
- Player development: reduce random decline for prime/young players (tighter Gaussian std)
- Draft value: factor in potential (elite prospects now valued as 1st round)
- Playoff watching: skip user game in simPlayoffRound so Watch Live button works
- Trading block: enforce seek position preferences strictly, show proposals inline
- UI: rename Cap Space to Salary Cap, auto-dismiss re-sign banners in 1s,
  hide redundant nav buttons, add Advance to Draft button on re-sign page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 移除edge runtime+恢复10000字支持，准备自部署

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: gate_poll no-op syncs no longer deduct trust budget credits

gate_poll actions with "approved" result were deducting 1 credit per
invocation despite the intent of zero cost. The record_action function
calculated cost from tier+result, ignoring that gate polls should
cost nothing. Now gate_poll actions explicitly skip cost calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
